items.title: MySQL 8.4.10 ships in Oracle's June 2026 monthly CSPU (8 fixes)
Percona Server for MySQL 8.4.10-10 released
pgvector 0.8.4/0.8.5 fix HNSW vacuum corruption and IVFFlat memory
CloudNativePG 1.30.0 adds DatabaseRole CRD and Primary Lease failover
MySQL CVE-2026-22015 Information Schema info disclosure (CVSS 4.3)
MongoDB 8.3 GA makes Cost-Based Ranker the default and $scoreFusion GA
8.3 replaces removeShard with new shard-draining command set
MongoDB 8.2 rapid release reaches EOL July 31 2026
CVE-2026-11933 server-side-JS use-after-free (CVSS 8.7/8.8) fixed in 8.0.26/8.2.11/8.3.4
June 9 wave: ~12 CVEs fixed in 8.2.10/8.3.3 incl. pre-auth BSONColumn stack overflow

CVE-2026-42812: critical Polaris metadata-write bypass (CVSS 9.9), fix 1.4.1
REST Catalog spec 1.11 server-side scan planning is the new catalog battleground

iceberg-rust 0.10.0 in vote (RC3)
Monthly CSPUs now live (3rd-Tuesday); June CSPU had zero DB-server CVEs

July 2026 quarterly CPU scheduled for Jul 21
19.29/19.30 RUs withdrawn over fix 34352668 corruption risk (verify reissues)
ORDS 26.4 (Winter 2026) to add Tomcat 10 / WebLogic 15 support
2026_03 behavior-change bundle now generally enabled (Gen2 default, QAS default)
2026_04 bundle enabled: Streamlit replication default-on, DYNAMIC_TABLES/ALERT_HISTORY columns, function signature limits
Gen2 is now the default generation for new standard warehouses
Query Acceleration Service enabled by default on new Gen2 and multi-cluster warehouses (scaling factor 2)

Dynamic Tables add ADAPTIVE and CUSTOM_INCREMENTAL refresh modes; FROZEN WHERE rename

Cortex Search resource budgets and Analytical Search public preview
Iceberg v3 and Snowflake-managed Iceberg storage GA (defer to Open Formats)

MFA/service-user auth enforcement Milestone 3 begins Aug 2026

Real-time-mode streaming watermark now strict (+1 ms); DStream checkpoint allowlist added
Maintenance updates across DBR 18.x and 17.3/16.4/15.4/14.3/13.3 LTS
Parquet v2 for Delta tables GA (DBR 18.1+)
Convert partitioned tables to Liquid Clustering GA; auto-TTL GA
Unity Catalog managed/foreign Iceberg + Iceberg v3 features GA

PAT token auto-scoping GA; identity federation default; Okta AIM GA

AUTO CDC flows for streaming tables in DBSQL GA
REPLACE WHERE flows GA; Lakeflow Connect row filtering GA
MySQL integrated CDC pipeline (Beta); Lakeflow Designer no-code GA
Managed Iceberg materialized views (Public Preview)
Lakehouse Real-Time low-latency serverless SQL warehouse (Beta)
Automatic cost attribution for MV/streaming-table refreshes in DBSQL
ai_query / ai_extract / ai_classify SQL functions GA
Vector Search renamed AI Search; full-text search without embeddings
Govern LLMs in Unity Catalog via Model services (Beta)

dbt-databricks 1.12.1 and Databricks CLI 0.203.2 released

Reservation routing by identity (principal-based assignment)

Fresh audited TPC-H results from Dell, Alibaba, HPE

DuckDB vs GPU on Apple M5 unified memory TPC-H harness

Flutter 3.44 / Dart 3.12 stable: Impeller-only Android, dot-shorthands
KMP production-ready, Compose Multiplatform iOS stable, experimental Swift export
